name: mozilla-nimbus-schemas

metadata.name: mozilla-nimbus-schemas
metadata.summary: Schemas used by Mozilla Nimbus and related projects.

documentation:
# Nimbus Schemas

This directory contains a package of schemas published to various repositories for use by different parts of the Mozilla Nimbus experimentation ecosystem.


## Installation/Usage
### Prerequisites
- python ^3.10
- poetry ^1.8.4
- node ^16
- yarn ^1.22

#### Common Operations
From project root (i.e., parent to this directory)
- Build: `make schemas_build`
- Run linting and tests: `make schemas_check`
- Code formatting: `make schemas_format`

#### Building Python Schemas Package
`make schemas_build_pypi`

#### Building Typescript Schemas Package
`make schemas_build_npm`

## Schemas
### Jetstream

Contains schemas describing analysis results, metadata, and errors from [Jetstream](https://github.com/mozilla/jetstream).


## Deployment
The build and deployment occurs automatically through CI. A deployment is triggered on merges into the `main` branch when the version number changes. Schemas are published to various repos for access in different languages.

#### Versioning
`mozilla-nimbus-schemas` uses a date-based versioning scheme (`CalVer`). The format is `yyyy.m.MINOR`, where `m` is the non-zero-padded month, and `MINOR` is an incrementing number starting from 1 for each month. Notably, this `MINOR` number does NOT correspond to the day of the month. For example, the second release in June of 2023 would have a version of `2023.6.2`.

#### Version Updates
1. To update the published package versions, update the `VERSION` file in this directory.
  - From the project root, you can run the helper script:
    - `./scripts/set_schemas_version.sh <version>`
  - Or write to the file:
    - `echo <version> > ./schemas/VERSION`
  - Or simply edit the file in any text editor.
2. Update the package versions with the new VERSION file:
  - `make schemas_version`

### Python
Published to PyPI as `mozilla-nimbus-schemas`

### Typescript
Published to NPM as `@mozilla/nimbus-schemas`

### Rust
Not yet implemented.

methods.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.tests.jetstream.test_population_sizing.TestPopulationSizing.test_parse_population_sizing
documentation: Test against known good data.

functions.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.tests.jetstream.test_metadata.test_parse_metadata
documentation: Test the custom json.loads functionality

functions.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.tests.jetstream.test_misc.test_string_coersion
documentation: Test that enum values properly coerce to strings.

classes.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.jetstream.misc.StrEnum
documentation:
This replicates the behavior of StrEnum from Python 3.11.

TODO: replace with `StrEnum` from enum package in Python 3.11+

classes.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.jetstream.misc.MetricGroup
documentation: TODO: Consider a "guardrail_metrics" group containing "days_of_use",
"retained", and "search_count".

classes.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.jetstream.misc.StatisticIngestEnum
documentation:
This is the list of statistics supported in Experimenter,
not a complete list of statistics available in Jetstream.

classes.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.experiments.experiments.RandomizationUnit
documentation: A unique, stable indentifier for the user used as an input to bucket hashing.

classes.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.experiments.experiments.DesktopExperimentBranch
documentation: The branch definition supported on Firefox Desktop 95+.

classes.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.experiments.experiments.DesktopAllVersionsExperimentBranch
documentation:
The branch definition supported on all Firefox Desktop versions.

This version requires the feature field to be present to support older Firefox Desktop
clients.

classes.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.experiments.experiments.SdkExperimentBranch
documentation:
The branch definition for SDK-based applications

Supported on Firefox for Android 96+ and Firefox for iOS 39+ and all versions of
Cirrus.

classes.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.experiments.experiments.ExperimentLocalizations
documentation:
Per-locale localization substitutions.

The top level key is the locale (e.g., "en-US" or "fr"). Each entry is a mapping of
string IDs to their localized equivalents.

classes.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.experiments.experiments.BaseExperiment
documentation:
The experiment definition accessible to:

1. The Nimbus SDK via Remote Settings
2. Jetstream via the Experimenter API

classes.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.experiments.experiments.DesktopNimbusExperiment
documentation:
A Nimbus experiment for Firefox Desktop.

This schema is less strict than DesktopAllVersionsNimbusExperiment and is intended for
use in Firefox Desktop.

classes.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.experiments.experiments.DesktopAllVersionsNimbusExperiment
documentation:
A Nimbus experiment for Firefox Desktop.

This schema is more strict than DesktopNimbusExperiment and is backwards
comaptible with Firefox Desktop versions less than 95. It is intended for use inside
Experimenter itself.

classes.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.experiments.experiments.SdkNimbusExperiment
documentation: A Nimbus experiment for Nimbus SDK-based applications.

classes.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.experiments.feature_manifests.SdkFeatureVariable
documentation: A feature variable.

classes.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.experiments.feature_manifests.DesktopFeatureVariable
documentation: A feature variable.

classes.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.experiments.feature_manifests.NimbusFeatureSchema
documentation: Information about a JSON schema.

classes.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.experiments.feature_manifests.BaseFeature
documentation: The Feature type.

classes.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.experiments.feature_manifests.SdkFeature
documentation: A feature.

classes.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.experiments.feature_manifests.DesktopFeature
documentation: A feature.

classes.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.experiments.feature_manifests.DesktopFeatureManifest
documentation:
The Firefox Desktop-specific feature manifest.

Firefox Desktop requires different fields for its features compared to the general
Nimbus feature manifest.

classes.name: mozilla_nimbus_schemas.experiments.feature_manifests.SdkFeatureManifest
documentation: The SDK-specific feature manifest.
